data.title: Hexagon Interim Report 1 January - 31 March 2026
data.description: In the first quarter of 2026, operating net sales from continuing operations in Stockholm reached 963.8 MEUR, showing 8% organic growth. When including acquired deferred revenue, net sales amounted to 963.6 MEUR. Adjusted gross earnings were 606.3 MEUR, a decrease from 619.1 MEUR.

data.description: A recent report highlights positive advancements in the ongoing effort to enhance safety measures to world-class standards and achieve a notable decrease in overall carbon emissions. The transformation efforts have led to a substantial reduction in absolute carbon emissions.

data.title: Hamilton Global Opportunities plc (ALHGO.PA) starts coverage of shares by Euroland Corporate, boosting investor interest.
data.description: The latest data reveals a surge in coronavirus cases with over 10,000 new infections reported in the past 24 hours. The total number of confirmed cases has now exceeded 500,000. Authorities are closely monitoring the situation as the virus continues to spread rapidly. In addition, there have been more than 200 new deaths linked to COVID-19, bringing the total number of fatalities to over 20,000. Health officials are urging the public to adhere to safety measures such as wearing masks, practicing social distancing, and frequent hand washing to help curb the spread of the virus. The government is considering implementing stricter restrictions to control the escalating situation.

data.title: Liquidity Provider Agreement with ABG Sundal Collier ASA
data.description: Gabriel Holding A/S has recently established a market maker agreement with ABG Sundal Collier ASA, which came into effect on 24 April 2026. This Liquidity Provider scheme aims to enhance liquidity on Nasdaq Copenhagen for the company's listed shares. The agreement is designed to facilitate trading and boost market activities by providing bid and ask prices, ensuring a smooth and efficient market. This collaboration is expected to significantly impact the trading volume and enhance overall market dynamics for Gabriel Holding A/S shares. The new arrangement signifies a strategic move to foster a more robust trading environment on Nasdaq Copenhagen.

data.title: WuXi Biologics Receives South Korea MFDS GMP Certification to Enable Commercial Manufacturing of Bispecific Antibody Therapeutics
data.description: WUXI, China, April 23, 2026 - A prominent Contract Research, Development, and Manufacturing Organization (CRDMO), WuXi Biologics (2269.HK), revealed the news about three of its manufacturing sites in Wuxi. These facilities include Drug Substance Facility 5 (MFG5) and Drug Product Facility 2 (DP2).

data.title: Apple patches flaw enabling FBI to view deleted Signal messages, extracted from iPhone notification database.
data.description: The FBI exploited a vulnerability to access decrypted previews of Signal messages stored in an iPhone's notification database, even if the app had been uninstalled.

data.title: Saab Q1 results 2026: A strong start to the year
data.description: Saab recently announced its financial results for the first quarter of 2026, recording robust organic sales growth, an increased operating margin, and positive cash flow. The company emphasized that its product portfolio is in line with the defense needs of numerous countries. The details were shared without specifying the source or the actual numbers involved.
